calendar.matters:
Demurrer To Xcmplt/Strike Filed By Pltff Christine Garcia Contd From 8/29;9/13;10/15
Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert E. Lazo, Esq. of THE CARDOZA LAW OFFICES 434-8790 for cross-defendant CHRISTINE GARCIA demurring party
Gary Dolinski, Esq. of the Law Offices of JOSEPH W. CARCIONE, JR. 367-6811 for cross-complainant JOSHUA MARKOWITZ opposing the demurrer
A R G U E D and the Court ruled on the demurrer as follows:
1st Cause of Action -- overruled
2nd Cause of Action -- sustained without leave to amend
3rd Cause of Action -- overruled
4th Cause of Action -- overruled.
With respect to the Motion to Strike:
The motion re the SLAPP statute is denied. The motion to strike malicious prosecution is MOOT. Motion to strike intentional infliction of emotional distress is overruled. Requests for sanctions by both parties DENIED.
(JJM/md) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
